metadata.description: Remap values from one numeric range to another - direct Unity equivalent

summary: Maps input value from [FromMin, FromMax] to [ToMin, ToMax]. Formula: out = (in - FromMin) / (FromMax - FromMin) * (ToMax - ToMin) + ToMin
clamp_mode: Optional clamping - ensure output stays within [ToMin, ToMax]
implementation: Direct 1:1 mapping to Unity Remap node
compatibility_loss_10_percent: Blender has interpolation curve option; standard Remap is linear only
